name: Sloppy Joe Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and onions until no longer pink. Ensure the meat is thoroughly broken up.
2. (Optional) Add one clove of minced garlic for flavor.
3. Combine all liquid ingredients in a pan.
4. Cook, uncovered, on low heat for about thirty minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce thickens.
5. Serve the sauce over buns and enjoy!
